rocminfo.summary: Agent 1                  ;Name:                    Intel(R) Xeon(R) Platinum 8462Y+    Marketing Name:          Intel(R) Xeon(R) Platinum 8462Y+   ;Vendor Name:             CPU                                 Agent 2                  ;Name:                    gfx942                              Marketing Name:          AMD Instinct MI300X VF             ;Vendor Name:             AMD                                 Name:                    amdgcn-amd-amdhsa--gfx942:sramecc+:xnack-;Name:                    amdgcn-amd-amdhsa--gfx9-4-generic:sramecc+:xnack-

results.vendorPath: rocBLAS rocblas_gemm_ex F16 input/F32 output/F32 accumulation
results.notes: public wrapper MFMA dispatch row via navatala_gpu_gemm_f16_f32; uses full-tile CTA64/CTA128 fast path for aligned alpha=1,beta=0 NN single-batch calls, full-tile semantic CTA64/CTA128 for tile-divisible alpha/beta or transpose single-batch calls, and edge-capable CTA64-first fallback otherwise; timing includes wrapper scalar-parameter setup and synchronization
